description: A determinate or indeterminate progress indicator. Omit 'value'/'total' for an indeterminate spinner; supply both for a determinate bar.

value.description: Current progress (0.0 to total); omit for indeterminate spinner

total.description: Maximum value; default 1.0 when value is set

title.description: Optional label shown with the progress view

states.progress.description: Override progress at runtime (0.0–total); set to null to revert to indeterminate
